summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. Added 15 new pytest cases for Stripe payments, Object Storage uploads, and WebSocket live tracking — appended to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. ALL 57 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend critical flows for Wallet (Stripe), BookRide (Leaflet+geolocation), TrackBooking (Leaflet+WS), and DriverKYC (uploads) verified via Playwright against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1209 lines — consider splitting into routers (payments, uploads, ws, bookings, ai) for maintainability before iteration 4.

Wallet.jsx checkout flow uses window.location.href = stripe_url for redirect; if the user closes the Stripe tab without returning, there's no cleanup of the initiated payment_transactions doc (leaves 'initiated' rows). Consider a background task to expire stale sessions.
TrackBooking falls back to 8s polling — make sure to close any open polling timer when the WS reconnects, otherwise both polling and WS will run together (minor, double-render risk).

DriverKYC: client-side accepts any image/* — no client-side size check; server-side 413 is verified but the user only sees the failed toast after the upload completes. Add a pre-upload size check to fail fast (small UX nit).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4/4 critical flows verified: Wallet+Stripe, BookRide+Leaflet, TrackBooking+WS, DriverKYC uploads)

seed_data_creation: Tests use existing demo accounts (customer/driver/admin/fleet @rkpooja.test, OTP 123456). New ephemeral data created during run: 2 Stripe checkout sessions (test mode), 2 KYC uploads (aadhaar.png, pan/todelete.png — pan one is soft-deleted), 3 bookings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py now has 57 tests including iter3 coverage. WebSocket tests use the `websockets` library v16 (already installed). Stripe test mode (sk_test_emergent) returns real checkout.stripe.com URLs; actual payment cannot complete in CI so payment_status remains 'unpaid' — idempotency was verified by ensuring two GET /payments/status calls produce consistent responses and don't credit wallet for unpaid sessions. Object storage uses Emergent /objstore/api/v1 (driven by EMERGENT_LLM_KEY); /api/uploads/file/{id} requires Bearer token and streams binary. Frontend routes: customer pages under /app/*, driver pages under /driver/* (NOT /app/driver/*).
